title: CLI reference (generated)
description: Schema for meta/cli-reference.json — the generated, authoritative CLI-surface artifact (R16). Source of truth: design.md §12. Written by `tools/render-cli-reference --generate` (recursive `claude --help` introspection ∪ meta/cli-reference-supplement.yaml); validated and freshness-checked by `tools/render-cli-reference --check` (R16.AC6). Every entry carries source + provenance so nothing is traceable to model memory (R12.AC3).

cli_version.description: Installed `claude --version` at generation time. Carries no generated-date — that lives in meta/version-record.md — so the artifact is byte-stable per CLI version (R16.AC6).

root.description: The `claude` root command and its recursively-introspected subcommand tree.

supplement_sections.description: Hand-authored doc-only surface `claude --help` cannot see (in-REPL slash commands, output styles); from meta/cli-reference-supplement.yaml (R16.AC4).

path.description: Command path from the root (e.g. ['mcp','add']); [] for the root.

provenance.description: The exact command introspected (e.g. 'claude mcp add --help').

arg.description: The value placeholder (e.g. '<level>'), or null for a boolean flag.

provenance.description: Doc URL + retrieval date for the section (R16.AC3); entries inherit it unless they set their own.

note.description: Optional context for the section (e.g. how the surface is configured).

unverified.description: true => not confirmable from the cited doc; rendered with an explicit marker (R12.AC3).
